instructions.instruction: Run comprehensive validation using all stages: `python3 scripts/validate_config.py --file <config-file> --check all`
instructions.relevant_when: Any Fluent Bit configuration validation task

instructions.instruction: Always check tag routing: trace every INPUT tag through FILTER Match patterns and OUTPUT Match patterns to verify no logs are silently dropped
instructions.relevant_when: Any Fluent Bit config that contains FILTER or OUTPUT sections

instructions.instruction: An INPUT tag that no OUTPUT Match pattern covers causes silent log loss — treat any unmatched tag as a P1 configuration error
instructions.relevant_when: When tag consistency check reports an unmatched INPUT tag

instructions.instruction: Never skip TLS certificate validation in output plugins; tls.verify Off in production is a security defect
instructions.relevant_when: When an OUTPUT plugin uses TLS and tls.verify Off is present

instructions.instruction: Replace all hardcoded credentials (HTTP_User, HTTP_Passwd, API tokens) with ${ENV_VAR} references
instructions.relevant_when: When a config contains plaintext credential values in INPUT, FILTER, or OUTPUT sections

instructions.instruction: Set Mem_Buf_Limit on all tail INPUT plugins to prevent OOM-kill during log bursts
instructions.relevant_when: When a tail INPUT is missing a Mem_Buf_Limit setting

instructions.instruction: Categorize validation findings by severity: Errors (must fix), Warnings (should fix), Info (consider), Best Practices (recommended)
instructions.relevant_when: When presenting validation results to the user

instructions.instruction: After proposing fixes, get user approval before applying them, then re-run validation to confirm all issues are resolved
instructions.relevant_when: When a validation produces findings that require file edits

instructions.instruction: Each Fluent Bit instance must use a unique storage.path; shared storage paths corrupt backpressure state across multiple instances
instructions.relevant_when: When a config includes a storage.path setting or when validating multiple config files for the same environment

instructions.instruction: Provide a structured completion summary listing fixed issues, per-check pass/fail status, and the overall validation result
instructions.relevant_when: After completing a full validation and fix cycle
